@title A market state contract to view the current state of
 @title an Overlay market

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (contract IOverlayV1Market,struct Oracle.Data memory,uint256) view returns (uint256)
function (contract IOverlayV1Market,struct Oracle.Data memory,uint256) view returns (uint256)
function (contract IOverlayV1Market,struct Oracle.Data memory,uint256) view returns (uint256)
function (contract IOverlayV1Market,struct Oracle.Data memory,uint256) view returns (uint256)
function (contract IOverlayV1Market,struct Oracle.Data memory) view returns (uint256)

ask(address,uint256).notice: Gets the ask price trader will receive on the Overlay marketgiven fraction of cap on open interest trade represents

bid(address,uint256).notice: Gets the bid price trader will receive on the Overlay marketgiven fraction of cap on open interest trade represents

capOi(address).notice: Gets the current cap on open interest on the Overlay marketaccounting for front and back-running bounds

returns.capOi_: as the current open interest cap

circuitBreakerLevel(address).details: circuit breaker level is reported as fraction of capOi in FixedPoint
circuitBreakerLevel(address).notice: Gets the current level of the circuit breaker for theopen interest cap on the Overlay market

returns.circuitBreakerLevel_: as the current circuit breaker level

collateral(address,address,uint256).details: N(t) = Q * (OI(t) / OI(0)) - D; where Q = notional at build,OI(t) = current open interest, OI(0) = open interest at build,D = debt at build
collateral(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the current collateral backing the position on theOverlay market for the given position owner, id

returns.collateral_: as the current collateral backing the position

cost(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the current cost of the position on the Overlaymarket for the given position owner, id

returns.cost_: as the cost to build the position

costEstimate(address,uint256,uint256,boo.notice: Gets the estimated cost of the position to be builton the Overlay market for the given (collateral, leverage,isLong) attributes

data(address).notice: Gets the oracle data from the given feed

debt(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the current debt of the position on the Overlaymarket for the given position owner, id

returns.debt_: as the current debt taken on by the position

debtEstimate(address,uint256,uint256,boo.notice: Gets the estimated debt of the position to be builton the Overlay market for the given (collateral, leverage,isLong) attributes

fractionOfCapOi(address,uint256).notice: Gets the fraction of the current open interest cap thegiven oi contracts represents on the Overlay market

returns.fractionOfCapOi_: as fraction of open interest cap given oi is

fundingRate(address).details: f = 2 * k * ( oiLong - oiShort ) / (oiLong + oiShort)such that long > short then positive
fundingRate(address).notice: Gets the current funding rate on the Overlay market

liquidatable(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets whether the position is currently liquidatable on the Overlaymarket for the given position owner, id

returns.liquidatable_: as whether the position is liquidatable

liquidationFee(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the liquidation fee rewarded to the liquidator ifposition currently liquidatable on the Overlay marketfor the given position owner, id

returns.liquidationFee_: as the current liquidation fee reward

liquidationPrice(address,address,uint256.notice: Gets the current liquidation price of the position on theOverlay market for the given position owner, id

liquidationPriceEstimate(address,uint256.notice: Gets the estimated liquidation price of the position to be builton the Overlay market for the given (collateral, leverage, isLong)attributes

maintenanceMargin(address,address,uint25.notice: Gets the maintenance margin required to keep the positionopen on the Overlay market for the given position owner, id

maintenanceMarginEstimate(address,uint25.notice: Gets the estimated maintenance margin of the position to be builton the Overlay market for the given (collateral, leverage, isLong)attributes

marginExcessBeforeLiquidation(address,ad.details: excess_ > 0: returns excess margin before liquidationexcess_ < 0, returns margin lost due to delayed liquidation
marginExcessBeforeLiquidation(address,ad.notice: Gets the current position remaining margin to eat throughbefore liquidation occurs on the Overlay marketfor the given position owner, id

returns.excess_: as the current value less maintenance and liq fees

market(address).notice: Gets the Overlay market address for the given feed

marketState(address).details: WARNING: makes many calls to market
marketState(address).notice: Gets relevant market info to aggregate calls into asingle function

returns.state_: as the current aggregate market state

mid(address).notice: Gets the mid price from feed used for liquidationson the Overlay market

minted(address).details: minted_ > 0 means more OVL has been minted than burned recently
minted(address).notice: Gets the current rolling amount minted (+) or burned (-)by the Overlay market

returns.minted_: as the current rolling amount minted

notional(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the current notional of the position on the Overlay marketfor the given position owner, id (accounts for PnL)

returns.notional_: as the current notional of the position

oi(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the current open interest of the position on the Overlaymarket for the given position owner, id

returns.oi_: as the current open interest occupied by the position

oiEstimate(address,uint256,uint256,bool).notice: Gets the estimated open interest of the position to be builton the Overlay market for the given (collateral, leverage,isLong) attributes

ois(address).notice: Gets the current open interest values on the Overlay marketaccounting for funding

returns.oiLong_: as the current open interest long
returns.oiShort_: as the current open interest short

position(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the position from the Overlay market or the givenposition owner and position id

positionEstimate(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Gets the estimated position to be built on the Overlay marketfor the given (collateral, leverage, isLong) attributes

prices(address).notice: Gets the current bid, ask, and mid price values on theOverlay market accounting for recent volume

returns.mid_: as the current mid price from feed

tradingFee(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the trading fee charged to unwind the position on theOverlay market for the given position owner, id

returns.tradingFee_: as the current trading fee charged

value(address,address,uint256).notice: Gets the current value of the position on the Overlay marketfor the given position owner, id

returns.value_: as the current value of the position

volumeAsk(address,uint256).notice: Gets the rolling volume on the ask after the trader placestrade on the Overlay market given fraction of cap onopen interest trade represents

returns.volumeAsk_: as the volume on the ask

volumeBid(address,uint256).notice: Gets the rolling volume on the bid after the trader placestrade on the Overlay market given fraction of cap onopen interest trade represents

returns.volumeBid_: as the volume on the bid

volumes(address).notice: Gets the current rolling volume on the bid and ask sidesof the Overlay market

returns.volumeAsk_: as the current rolling volume on the ask
returns.volumeBid_: as the current rolling volume on the bid
